description: Create an isometric projection drawing of a fire sprinkler riser in LibreCAD. The drawing should feature a continuous pipe run on layer 'PIPE_CENTERLINE' (Color: Red) starting at absolute coordinate (200, 100) with segments of 1000 mm at 90 degrees, 1200 mm at 150 degrees, 800 mm at 30 degrees, and 300 mm at 270 degrees. On layer 'FITTINGS' (Color: Cyan), include a circle with radius 40 at the junction of the first and second segments and a circle with radius 20 at the end of the final segment. On layer 'TEXT' (Color: White), add the labels 'RISER' near the first vertical segment and 'DN 100' near the main horizontal run. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/fire_riser_iso.dxf.
